expected.notes: H-1B registration signatory and payment receipt cardholder match; rule requires mismatch operator to fire, so it must not fire.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'h1b_receipt_signatory_mismatch', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - comparison.h1b_registration_receipt_signatory_name mismatch
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
